	</section>

<script>
(function() {
	var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
	var department = params.get('department');
	if (!department) return;

	// ホワイトリストで許可する値のみ受け付ける（XSS対策）
	var allowed = ['保育運営事業', '放課後支援事業', 'その他'];
	if (allowed.indexOf(department) === -1) return;

	function setDepartment() {
		// select要素の場合
		var select = document.querySelector('select[name="your-department"]');
		if (select) {
			select.value = department;
			select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
			return true;
		}
		// radio要素の場合
		var radios = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="your-department"]');
		for (var i = 0; i < radios.length; i++) {
			if (radios[i].value === department) {
				radios[i].checked = true;
				radios[i].dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
				return true;
			}
		}
		return false;
	}

	// DOMContentLoaded時に試行
	document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
		if (!setDepartment()) {
			// CF7の初期化完了を待って再試行
			document.addEventListener('wpcf7ready', function() {
				setDepartment();
			});
		}
	});
})();
</script>
